'''鈭歵-ch-d''' ('''tachada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiggle|jiggle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiggle|jiggle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-ch-d
|-
! Lemma
| tachada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tachadithi|tachadithi]] || [[word:tachadiji|tachadiji]] || [[word:tachadishi|tachadishi]] || [[word:tachadi|tachadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachaduthuth|tachaduthuth]] || [[word:tachadujuj|tachadujuj]] || [[word:tachadushush|tachadushush]] || [[word:tachad|tachad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachaduthu|tachaduthu]] || [[word:tachaduju|tachaduju]] || [[word:tachadushu|tachadushu]] || [[word:tachadu|tachadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachadufuth|tachadufuth]] || [[word:tachadufuj|tachadufuj]] || [[word:tachadufush|tachadufush]] || [[word:tachaduf|tachaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tachadethe|tachadethe]] || [[word:tachadeje|tachadeje]] || [[word:tachadeshe|tachadeshe]] || [[word:tachade|tachade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachadothoth|tachadothoth]] || [[word:tachadojoj|tachadojoj]] || [[word:tachadoshosh|tachadoshosh]] || [[word:tachad|tachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachadotho|tachadotho]] || [[word:tachadojo|tachadojo]] || [[word:tachadosho|tachadosho]] || [[word:tachado|tachado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachadofoth|tachadofoth]] || [[word:tachadofoj|tachadofoj]] || [[word:tachadofosh|tachadofosh]] || [[word:tachadof|tachadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tachad忙th忙|tachad忙th忙]] || [[word:tachad忙j忙|tachad忙j忙]] || [[word:tachad忙sh忙|tachad忙sh忙]] || [[word:tachad忙|tachad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachadathath|tachadathath]] || [[word:tachadajaj|tachadajaj]] || [[word:tachadashash|tachadashash]] || [[word:tachad|tachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachadatha|tachadatha]] || [[word:tachadaja|tachadaja]] || [[word:tachadasha|tachadasha]] || [[word:tachada|tachada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachadafath|tachadafath]] || [[word:tachadafaj|tachadafaj]] || [[word:tachadafash|tachadafash]] || [[word:tachadaf|tachadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tachadasha|tachadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotachadasha|gotachadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitachadasha|gokitachadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tachadn眉sha|tachadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotachadnkn眉sha|gotachadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitachadn眉sha|gokitachadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tachadsh毛sha|tachadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotachadnksh毛sha|gotachadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitachadsh毛sha|gokitachadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tachadrosha|tachadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotachadnkrosha|gotachadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitachadrosha|gokitachadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tachadmusha|tachadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotachadnkmusha|gotachadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitachadmusha|gokitachadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tachadsherasha|tachadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotachadnksherasha|gotachadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitachadsherasha|gokitachadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tachadngasha|tachadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotachadnkngasha|gotachadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitachadngasha|gokitachadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tachadyasha|tachadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotachadnkyasha|gotachadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitachadyasha|gokitachadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tachadyamasha|tachadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotachadnkyamasha|gotachadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitachadyamasha|gokitachadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tachadn眉sh毛sha|tachadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotachadnkn眉sh毛sha|gotachadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitachadn眉sh毛sha|gokitachadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tachadn眉rosha|tachadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotachadnkn眉rosha|gotachadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitachadn眉rosha|gokitachadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tachadn眉musha|tachadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotachadnkn眉musha|gotachadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitachadn眉musha|gokitachadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tachadsh毛n眉sha|tachadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotachadnksh毛n眉sha|gotachadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitachadsh毛n眉sha|gokitachadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tachadsh毛rosha|tachadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotachadnksh毛rosha|gotachadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitachadsh毛rosha|gokitachadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tachadsh毛musha|tachadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotachadnksh毛musha|gotachadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitachadsh毛musha|gokitachadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tachadron眉sha|tachadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotachadnkron眉sha|gotachadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitachadron眉sha|gokitachadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tachadrosh毛sha|tachadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotachadnkrosh毛sha|gotachadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitachadrosh毛sha|gokitachadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tachadromusha|tachadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotachadnkromusha|gotachadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitachadromusha|gokitachadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tachadmun眉sha|tachadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotachadnkmun眉sha|gotachadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitachadmun眉sha|gokitachadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tachadmush毛sha|tachadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotachadnkmush毛sha|gotachadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitachadmush毛sha|gokitachadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tachadmurosha|tachadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotachadnkmurosha|gotachadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitachadmurosha|gokitachadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tachad|tachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:t忙ch忙d|t忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotachad|hotachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hot忙ch忙d|hot忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotachad|hohotachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohot忙ch忙d|hohot忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉tachad|n眉tachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉t忙ch忙d|n眉t忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉tachad|n眉n眉tachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉t忙ch忙d|n眉n眉t忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂tachad|n茂tachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂t忙ch忙d|n茂t忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂tachad|n茂n茂tachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂t忙ch忙d|n茂n茂t忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutachad|lutachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lut忙ch忙d|lut忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutachad|lulutachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulut忙ch忙d|lulut忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litachad|litachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lit忙ch忙d|lit忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitachad|lilitachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilit忙ch忙d|lilit忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotachad|kotachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kot忙ch忙d|kot忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotachad|kokotachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokot忙ch忙d|kokot忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketachad|ketachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ket忙ch忙d|ket忙ch忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketachad|keketachad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keket忙ch忙d|keket忙ch忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
